tasks.subject: Fix Bug 11: n attribute ignored for regex (R:) metarules (graph.rs)
tasks.description: In graph.rs, the regex metarule matching loop doesn't check for the n (non-virtual) attribute. Add the check mirroring what % / & metarules do: if the metarule has NO_VIRTUAL attribute and the target file doesn't exist on fs, skip the match.
tasks.activeForm: Fixing n attribute for regex metarules

tasks.subject: Fix Bug 12: E attribute not enforced in parallel scheduler (sched.rs)
tasks.description: In the parallel worker loop in run_parallel(), when a recipe fails, check if the rule has the E (EXCLUSIVE) attribute. If yes, log failure but don't set cancelled and don't mark dependents as failed — treat it like keep_going for just this one target.
tasks.activeForm: Fixing E attribute in parallel scheduler
